title: Smyrna: The Destruction of a Cosmopolitan City - 1900-1922
original_title: Smyrna: The Destruction of a Cosmopolitan City - 1900-1922
overview: A unique exhibition of rare and unknown photographs of Smyrna from American and European archives and private collections.
